message.content:
- This chapter provides a framework for making entrepreneurial choices in a new field or domain
- Entrepreneurs must have a core idea for their venture, which is the fundamental opportunity and insight the venture will be built on
- The core idea is hard to come by and gives the entrepreneur insight into the choices they will have to make
- If the core idea changes, it is essentially a new venture
- Flickr's founders changed their core idea from a social game to a photo-sharing platform, resulting in a new and distinct venture
